requirement_topic.en: NC (Normas Cubanas) EMC Standards — Radiated and Conducted Emissions for Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: NC（古巴国家标准）EMC标准——无线电及电信终端设备辐射和传导发射
requirement_topic.zht: NC（古巴國家標準）EMC標準——無線電及電信終端裝置輻射和傳導發射

summary.en: Cuba applies NC (Normas Cubanas) standards for electromagnetic compatibility (EMC), administered by ONN (Oficina Nacional de Normalización). NC standards for EMC are partially harmonised with IEC/CISPR international standards, reflecting Cuba's transition from Soviet-era GOST-derived standards toward IEC/ISO alignment. Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and IoT devices must meet applicable NC EMC standards covering radiated and conducted emissions and, where specified, immunity. The MINCOM technical file submission for homologación should include EMC test data consistent with NC or harmonised IEC/CISPR requirements. Given limited domestic accredited EMC test lab capacity in Cuba, existing IEC/CISPR-based test reports from internationally accredited laboratories are typically accepted by MINCOM as supporting documentation within the homologación technical file.
summary.zh: 古巴采用由ONN（国家标准化办公室）管理的NC（古巴国家标准）进行电磁兼容（EMC）规范。NC EMC标准部分与IEC/CISPR国际标准协调，反映了古巴从苏联时代GOST衍生标准向IEC/ISO标准的过渡。Wi-Fi、蓝牙及物联网设备须符合涵盖辐射和传导发射及（如有规定）抗扰性的适用NC EMC标准。提交MINCOM型式认可技术文件时，应包含符合NC或协调IEC/CISPR要求的EMC检测数据。鉴于古巴国内认可EMC检测实验室能力有限，来自国际认可实验室的现有IEC/CISPR基础检测报告通常作为型式认可技术文件内的支持文件被MINCOM接受。
summary.zht: 古巴採用由ONN（國家標準化辦公室）管理的NC（古巴國家標準）進行電磁相容（EMC）規範。NC EMC標準部分與IEC/CISPR國際標準協調，反映了古巴從蘇聯時代GOST衍生標準向IEC/ISO標準的過渡。Wi-Fi、藍牙及物聯網裝置須符合涵蓋輻射和傳導發射及（如有規定）抗擾性的適用NC EMC標準。提交MINCOM型式認可技術文件時，應包含符合NC或協調IEC/CISPR要求的EMC檢測數據。鑑於古巴國內認可EMC檢測實驗室能力有限，來自國際認可實驗室的現有IEC/CISPR基礎檢測報告通常作為型式認可技術文件內的支持文件被MINCOM接受。

standards_or_laws: NC (Normas Cubanas) EMC standards — harmonised with IEC/CISPR series; administered by ONN (Oficina Nacional de Normalización)
CISPR 32 (harmonised via NC) — Multimedia equipment EMC, emissions requirements
CISPR 35 (harmonised via NC) — Multimedia equipment EMC, immunity requirements
IEC 61000 series (partially adopted via NC) — General EMC limits and test methods
MINCOM homologación technical file requirement — EMC test data required as part of type approval submission

summary.en: In China, EMC compliance for wireless and consumer electronic devices is governed by GB/T 9254 (information technology equipment EMC, aligned with CISPR 22/32) and GB 17625 (conducted disturbance, aligned with IEC 61000-3 series), along with device-category-specific GB EMC standards. EMC compliance is part of the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) assessment and is tested by CNCA-designated laboratories. SRRC type approval also includes RF emission parameter verification.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及消费电子设备的EMC合规由GB/T 9254（信息技术设备EMC，与CISPR 22/32协调）和GB 17625（传导骚扰，与IEC 61000-3系列协调）以及特定设备类别GB EMC标准管辖。EMC合规是CCC（中国强制认证）评估的一部分，由CNCA指定实验室检测。SRRC型号核准还包括射频发射参数验证。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及消費電子裝置的EMC合規由GB/T 9254（資訊技術設備EMC，與CISPR 22/32協調）和GB 17625（傳導騷擾，與IEC 61000-3系列協調）以及特定裝置類別GB EMC標準管轄。EMC合規是CCC（中國強制認證）評估的一部分，由CNCA指定實驗室檢測。SRRC型號核准還包括射頻發射參數驗證。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment EMC (harmonised with CISPR 22/32)
GB/T 17626 series — EMC immunity test methods (IEC 61000-4 series equivalent)
CCC assessment — EMC component tested by CNCA-accredited laboratory
SRRC type approval — RF emission parameter compliance

gap.en: Cuba requires EMC compliance under NC (Normas Cubanas) standards rather than Chinese GB standards. In practice, IEC/CISPR-based test reports from internationally accredited laboratories are accepted within the MINCOM homologación technical file given Cuba's limited domestic lab capacity — this reduces the practical gap for exporters who already hold CE or similar internationally-accredited EMC test reports. However, Cuban NC standards and MINCOM acceptance criteria should be verified for the specific device category; NC standards are not uniformly published in English and may require engagement with a Cuban regulatory contact. CCC EMC reports are not independently recognised by MINCOM but may be cited as supporting data within the technical file.
gap.zh: 古巴要求符合NC（古巴国家标准）而非中国GB标准的EMC合规。实践中，鉴于古巴国内实验室能力有限，来自国际认可实验室的IEC/CISPR基础检测报告在MINCOM型式认可技术文件中被接受——这对已持有CE或类似国际认可EMC检测报告的出口商减少了实际差距。但应针对具体设备类别核验古巴NC标准和MINCOM接受标准；NC标准未统一以英文发布，可能需要与古巴监管联系人对接。CCC EMC报告不被MINCOM独立承认，但可作为技术文件内的支持数据引用。
gap.zht: 古巴要求符合NC（古巴國家標準）而非中國GB標準的EMC合規。實踐中，鑑於古巴國內實驗室能力有限，來自國際認可實驗室的IEC/CISPR基礎檢測報告在MINCOM型式認可技術文件中被接受——這對已持有CE或類似國際認可EMC檢測報告的出口商減少了實際差距。但應針對具體裝置類別核驗古巴NC標準和MINCOM接受標準；NC標準未統一以英文發布，可能需要與古巴監管聯繫人對接。CCC EMC報告不被MINCOM獨立承認，但可作為技術文件內的支持數據引用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC compliance under applicable NC (Normas Cubanas) standards is required as part of the MINCOM homologación technical file for radio and telecom terminal equipment in Cuba
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — EMC compliance under applicable GB standards (GB/T 9254, GB 17625, GB/T 17626 series) is required as part of CCC assessment for applicable consumer electronics in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cuba requires EMC compliance under NC (Normas Cubanas) standards as part of MINCOM homologación. IEC/CISPR-based test reports from internationally accredited laboratories are typically accepted in the MINCOM review given limited domestic lab capacity. Chinese GB/CCC EMC reports are not independently recognised but may support the technical file. Verify applicable NC standards for the specific device category and current MINCOM acceptance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 古巴要求符合NC（古巴国家标准）EMC标准，作为MINCOM型式认可的一部分。鉴于国内实验室能力有限，来自国际认可实验室的IEC/CISPR基础检测报告在MINCOM审查中通常被接受。中国GB/CCC EMC报告不被独立承认，但可支持技术文件。发货前请与合格监管专业人士核验具体设备类别适用的NC标准及现行MINCOM接受惯例。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 古巴要求符合NC（古巴國家標準）EMC標準，作為MINCOM型式認可的一部分。鑑於國內實驗室能力有限，來自國際認可實驗室的IEC/CISPR基礎檢測報告在MINCOM審查中通常被接受。中國GB/CCC EMC報告不被獨立承認，但可支持技術文件。發貨前請與合格監管專業人士核驗具體裝置類別適用的NC標準及現行MINCOM接受慣例。

requirement_topic.en: MINCOM Radio Spectrum Management — RF Type Approval and Frequency Plan Compliance
requirement_topic.zh: MINCOM无线电频谱管理——射频型号核准与频率规划合规
requirement_topic.zht: MINCOM無線電頻譜管理——射頻型號核准與頻率規劃合規

summary.en: MINCOM (Ministerio de Comunicaciones) manages Cuba's national radio frequency spectrum in accordance with ITU Radio Regulations and Cuba's national frequency allocation plan. Radio devices (including Wi-Fi 2.4 GHz / 5 GHz, Bluetooth, Zigbee, and other ISM/SRD-band devices) must comply with Cuba's national frequency allocations and maximum permitted output power levels. Wi-Fi 5 GHz band usage may be subject to restrictions and must be verified against Cuba's national frequency plan. The MINCOM homologación technical file must include RF parameter documentation demonstrating compliance with permitted frequencies and power levels. ETECSA, as the national telecom monopoly operator, controls network access; device RF parameters must be compatible with ETECSA network specifications for devices intended to connect to Cuban telecom infrastructure.
summary.zh: MINCOM（通信部）依据ITU无线电规则和古巴国家频率分配计划管理古巴国家无线电频谱。无线电设备（包括Wi-Fi 2.4GHz/5GHz、蓝牙、Zigbee及其他ISM/SRD频段设备）须符合古巴国家频率分配和最大允许发射功率。Wi-Fi 5GHz频段使用可能受到限制，须对照古巴国家频率规划核验。MINCOM型式认可技术文件须包含证明符合许可频率和功率水平的射频参数文件。ETECSA作为国家电信垄断运营商控制网络接入；用于连接古巴电信基础设施的设备，其射频参数须与ETECSA网络规格兼容。
summary.zht: MINCOM（通信部）依據ITU無線電規則和古巴國家頻率分配計劃管理古巴國家無線電頻譜。無線電裝置（包括Wi-Fi 2.4GHz/5GHz、藍牙、Zigbee及其他ISM/SRD頻段裝置）須符合古巴國家頻率分配和最大允許發射功率。Wi-Fi 5GHz頻段使用可能受到限制，須對照古巴國家頻率規劃核驗。MINCOM型式認可技術文件須包含證明符合許可頻率和功率水平的射頻參數文件。ETECSA作為國家電信壟斷營運商控制網路接入；用於連接古巴電信基礎設施的裝置，其射頻參數須與ETECSA網路規格相容。

standards_or_laws: ITU Radio Regulations — applied by MINCOM as the Cuban administration for ITU purposes
Cuba National Frequency Allocation Plan (Plan Nacional de Atribución de Frecuencias) — administered by MINCOM
MINCOM homologación technical file — RF parameter section required for all radio devices
Decreto-Ley No. 99/1987 De las Telecomunicaciones — telecom and spectrum management base law

summary.en: In China, SRRC (State Radio Regulatory Commission, under MIIT) administers radio type approval for radio transmitters and transceivers. Wi-Fi (IEEE 802.11), Bluetooth, and other ISM/SRD-band devices require SRRC type approval, which verifies RF parameters including operating frequency, channel plan, and maximum EIRP against China's national frequency allocation plan and SRRC technical requirements. MIIT administers China's national frequency plan in accordance with ITU Radio Regulations.
summary.zh: 在中国，SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会，隶属工业和信息化部）负责无线电发射设备的无线电型号核准。Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11）、蓝牙及其他ISM/SRD频段设备须取得SRRC型号核准，核准对照中国国家频率分配计划和SRRC技术要求核验射频参数，包括工作频率、信道规划和最大等效全向辐射功率（EIRP）。工业和信息化部依据ITU无线电规则管理中国国家频率规划。
summary.zht: 在中國，SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會，隸屬工業和信息化部）負責無線電發射設備的無線電型號核准。Wi-Fi（IEEE 802.11）、藍牙及其他ISM/SRD頻段裝置須取得SRRC型號核准，核准對照中國國家頻率分配計劃和SRRC技術要求核驗射頻參數，包括工作頻率、信道規劃和最大等效全向輻射功率（EIRP）。工業和信息化部依據ITU無線電規則管理中國國家頻率規劃。

standards_or_laws: SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulatory Commission, MIIT; mandatory for radio transmitters in China
MIIT National Frequency Allocation Plan — China's frequency plan administered in accordance with ITU Radio Regulations
GB 15629 series — Technical standards for Wi-Fi (802.11) devices in China
YD/T series — MIIT telecom industry standards for radio and terminal equipment

gap.en: Cuba's national frequency allocation plan and MINCOM-permitted operating frequencies and power levels may differ from China's SRRC-approved parameters. Exporters must verify that the device's RF operating frequencies and output power levels are permitted under Cuba's national frequency plan. Wi-Fi 5 GHz band availability and permitted channels in Cuba should be specifically verified — restrictions may apply beyond those in China. SRRC approval does not substitute for MINCOM RF parameter review. Spanish-language RF parameter documentation is required in the MINCOM technical file.
gap.zh: 古巴国家频率分配计划和MINCOM允许的工作频率及功率可能与中国SRRC核准参数不同。出口商须核验设备的射频工作频率和发射功率是否在古巴国家频率规划允许范围内。应特别核验古巴Wi-Fi 5GHz频段的可用性和允许信道——可能存在超出中国限制的额外限制。SRRC核准不能替代MINCOM射频参数审查。MINCOM技术文件中须提供西班牙语射频参数文件。
gap.zht: 古巴國家頻率分配計劃和MINCOM允許的工作頻率及功率可能與中國SRRC核准參數不同。出口商須核驗裝置的射頻工作頻率和發射功率是否在古巴國家頻率規劃允許範圍內。應特別核驗古巴Wi-Fi 5GHz頻段的可用性和允許信道——可能存在超出中國限制的額外限制。SRRC核准不能替代MINCOM射頻參數審查。MINCOM技術文件中須提供西班牙語射頻參數文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — RF parameter compliance with Cuba's national frequency plan and MINCOM permitted frequencies and power levels is required as part of the MINCOM homologación technical file; ETECSA network compatibility required for devices connecting to Cuban telecom infrastructure
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — SRRC radio type approval required for all radio transmitters and transceivers in China, verifying RF parameters against China's national frequency plan and SRRC technical requirements

source.publisher: MINCOM — Ministerio de Comunicaciones de Cuba

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Cuba's national frequency plan and MINCOM RF parameter requirements apply to all radio devices imported or used in Cuba. Chinese SRRC approval is not recognised by MINCOM. RF operating frequencies, channel plans, and output power levels must be verified against Cuba's national frequency allocation plan. Wi-Fi 5 GHz restrictions should be specifically confirmed. Verify current MINCOM RF requirements and Cuba's frequency plan with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 古巴国家频率规划和MINCOM射频参数要求适用于所有在古巴进口或使用的无线电设备。中国SRRC核准不被MINCOM承认。射频工作频率、信道规划和发射功率须对照古巴国家频率分配计划核验。应特别确认Wi-Fi 5GHz限制。发货前请与合格监管专业人士核验现行MINCOM射频要求和古巴频率规划。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 古巴國家頻率規劃和MINCOM射頻參數要求適用於所有在古巴進口或使用的無線電裝置。中國SRRC核准不被MINCOM承認。射頻工作頻率、信道規劃和發射功率須對照古巴國家頻率分配計劃核驗。應特別確認Wi-Fi 5GHz限制。發貨前請與合格監管專業人士核驗現行MINCOM射頻要求和古巴頻率規劃。
